bullish: Price is above the 20 EMA and 50 EMA on the Daily
RSI is between 50 and 70 (momentum without overbought)
MACD histogram is positive and rising
bearish: Price is below the 20 EMA and 50 EMA on the Daily
RSI is between 30 and 50 (weakness without oversold)
MACD histogram is negative and falling
Volume above average on down days
neutral: Price is between the 20 EMA and 50 EMA
MACD histogram is near zero or flat

risk_rules: Only take trades where R:R is at least 1:2
Always set a stop loss at the nearest support/resistance level
If 2 losing trades in a row, reduce position size by 50%
notes: Swing trading TSX equities. Focus: tech (SHOP, CLS), mining/gold (AEM, CGG, WPM, VNP), aerospace/defense (BBD-B). Watch gold prices for mining plays. Watch USD/CAD for cross-border impact on SHOP and CLS.
